<!-- Thanks for sending a PR! A small bit of structure helps us merge it faster. -->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. The diff shows *what* — tell us *why*. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Closes #123, fixes #456 — leave blank if N/A -->

## Screenshots / video

<!-- For UI changes, drop a before/after screenshot or a 10-second Loom. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🎨 UI / design
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] ⚙️ Build / CI / deps
- [ ] 🔥 Removes code (deletions welcome)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] `npm run dev` — clicked through the change manually
- [ ] `npm run build` — passed locally
- [ ] No `console.log`, `debugger`, dead code, or committed secrets
- [ ] One feature or fix per PR (split unrelated changes)
- [ ] Works in both light AND dark mode
- [ ] Works on mobile + desktop
- [ ] Keyboard navigable, visible focus rings preserved
- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](https://github.com/Ritika8081/Hyred/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to?

<!-- e.g. "the prompt change in src/lib/ai.ts — feedback on phrasing welcome" -->
